title: viburnum sulcatum
intro: Viburnum sulcatum, a shrub-like perennial plant belonging to the Adoxaceae family, is native to China and is commonly known as the furrowed viburnum or mountain sweet olive. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viburnum sulcatum include its ability to treat fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
